description_long: This is a compact yellow hatchback car with a streamlined, aerodynamic body and a two-door configuration. The car features a sloped rear with a large rear window and a rear hatch door, typical of hatchback designs. The front end is equipped with sleek headlights, a subtle grille, and a visible license plate. The side profile reveals black trim along the doors and windows, as well as simple, silver-colored wheels with hubcaps. The windows are tinted black, and the roof is slightly curved, contributing to the car's modern appearance. The rear view shows a single exhaust pipe and taillights that wrap around the corners of the vehicle.
description: A compact yellow hatchback car with two doors, black trim, tinted windows, and a rear hatch door. It features sleek headlights, silver wheels, and a modern, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headlights, grille, and front license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door configuration, black trim, and silver wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rear hatch door, taillights, rear license plate, and exhaust pipe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the two doors, black trim, and wheels.
